sections.paragraph:
σύμφυτος (σύμφῠτος, ον,)
Etym. συμφύομαι

1. born with one, congenital, innate, natural, inborn, inbred, Pind., Plat.; ς. αἰών our natural age, i. e. old age, Aesch.; νεικέων ς. τέκτων the natural author of strife, i. e. cause of strife natural to the race, Aesch.; ἐς τὸ ς. according to one's nature, Eur.

2. c. dat. natural to, Lys.
